# Multimodal

**Path:** `global_descriptor/learning/multimodal`

Learned place descriptors that fuse LiDAR with image, radar, semantic, or other sensor modalities.

## Scope

**Include:** LiDAR-camera fusion; cross-modal descriptor

**Exclude:** LiDAR-only descriptor using intensity
